titleStmt.title: SII 18.41: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 41. (B.K. No. 179 of 1933-34.) KĀRJŌḶ, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Haṇumantadēva.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 918, Durmukhi, Śrāvaṇa ba. 1, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 996, August 2. The week-day, however was Sunday.

It records the rate of taxes fixed on different kinds of land granted to the uroḍeya Kēśavayya of Karaṁjōḷa with the consent of pergaḍe [Da]ḷāpayya and others. [Da]ḷāpayya was a subordinate of Das11avarmadēva who is described as the pādapaṁkaja-bhramara of Āhavamalla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahā
sāmaṁtādhipati sāhasarudraṁ krāntanārāyaṇa vivēkakama
ḷāsanaṁ saṁgrāmamūrttaṇḍa pratāpadiḷīpaṁ raṇaraṁgarāghavaṁ
dharmmadharmmūtmajaṁ vikrāntakauntēyaṁ śaucapavanā
tmajaṁ satyarādhēyaṁ bhōgakusumāyudhaṁ vairībhaka
ṇṭhīravaṁ vīracūḍāmaṇi māṇikyaṁ tyelana cakraṁ
bhuvanaikamalla śrīmadāhavamalla pādapaṁkajabhrama
raṁ śrīmaddaśavarmmadēvara śrīpādapadmōpajīvigaḷa
ḷappa rājasāmyada perggaḍe daḷāpayyapramukha karaṇamuṁ
manneyaverggaḍe goṇnayyapramukha karaṇamuṁ pēḻe Avaranumata
doḷ śakavarṣa 918neya durmmukhisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 1
sōmavāra karaṁjōḷada Ūroḍeya kēsavayyaṁge saṁ
yya koṭṭa saṁsthāpatraventandoḍe manmathasaṁvatsaradoḷu
bīja biḻda Uttama kariya nelakke salikte madhyamakke
salike 1 paṇa 3 kaniṣṭhakke salike 1 Uḻkege Uḻta
pēḷda maryyāde baḻikaṁ varṣaṁprati Uttama ne
lakke paṇa 2 madhyamakke paṇa 1 Aḍḍa 1 kaniṣṭa
kke paṇa 1 caḻivamāge 7 barisado
nilkaṁ Irkkaṇna maryyādege vyavasthe
lla bareda madhusūdana
Digital edition of SII 18.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
